description: Configure a regionalized supply chain for 'Corrugated board boxes' using the USLCI database and TRACI 2.1 methods located in ~/LCA_Imports/. Regionalize the electricity supply by setting the 'WECC' grid as the Default Provider for the 'Corrugated board boxes' manufacturing process and the 'SERC' grid for the 'Linerboard' production process. Generate a product system for the boxes and export the TRACI 2.1 LCIA results to ~/LCA_Results/regional_boxes_lcia.csv.
